position.label: Public pensions benchmark audit
position.note: Overlay the SWFI public-pensions target queue against the 2024 PI-300 U.S. cohort to expose where the highest-value allocator records still lack key-person coverage.

benchmark.market_scope: U.S. institutions only for direct overlap in this audit
